limitations: This is a structural proxy: normalization can create false positives and is not semantic equivalence.
Identifiers and literals are replaced by typed placeholders; binding identity, types, and runtime behavior are not compared.
Only supported source files discovered by the shared source loader are considered.
Syntax-error files are parsed using tree-sitter's error-tolerant tree, so their results may be partial.
Reported groups are capped after deterministic severity ordering; totals describe only reported groups.
